mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.title, g.slug, g.summary, g.cover_image, g.category_id, gc.category_name, g.author_id, u.nickname AS author_name, g.platform, g.rating, g.developer, g.publisher, g.release_date, g.view_count, g.like_count, g.favorite_count, g.published_at, g.created_at, t.id AS tag_id, t.tag_name AS tag_name, t.tag_code AS tag_code, t.color AS tag_color FROM games g LEFT JOIN game_categories gc ON g.category_id = gc.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN game_tags gt ON g.id = gt.game_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON gt.tag_id = t.id WHERE g.status = 1 AND g.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY g.published_at DESC

SELECT g.id, g.title, g.slug, g.summary, g.cover_image, g.category_id, gc.category_name, g.author_id, u.nickname AS author_name, g.platform, g.rating, g.developer, g.publisher, g.release_date, g.view_count, g.like_count, g.favorite_count, g.published_at, g.created_at, t.id AS tag_id, t.tag_name AS tag_name, t.tag_code AS tag_code, t.color AS tag_color FROM games g JOIN ( SELECT id FROM games WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 6 ) top ON g.id = top.id LEFT JOIN game_categories gc ON g.category_id = gc.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN game_tags gt ON g.id = gt.game_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON gt.tag_id = t.id WHERE g.status = 1 AND g.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY g.view_count DESC

SELECT g.id, g.title, g.slug, g.summary, g.cover_image, g.category_id, gc.category_name, g.author_id, u.nickname AS author_name, g.platform, g.rating, g.developer, g.publisher, g.release_date, g.view_count, g.like_count, g.favorite_count, g.published_at, g.created_at, t.id AS tag_id, t.tag_name AS tag_name, t.tag_code AS tag_code, t.color AS tag_color FROM games g LEFT JOIN game_categories gc ON g.category_id = gc.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN game_tags gt ON g.id = gt.game_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON gt.tag_id = t.id WHERE g.status = 1 AND g.is_deleted = 0 AND g.id IN ( SELECT game_id FROM game_tags WHERE tag_id = #{tagId} ) ORDER BY g.published_at DESC

SELECT g.id, g.title, g.slug, g.summary, g.content, g.cover_image, g.category_id, gc.category_name, g.author_id, u.nickname AS author_name, g.platform, g.rating, g.developer, g.publisher, g.release_date, g.view_count, g.like_count, g.favorite_count, g.published_at, g.created_at, t.id AS tag_id, t.tag_name AS tag_name, t.tag_code AS tag_code, t.color AS tag_color FROM games g LEFT JOIN game_categories gc ON g.category_id = gc.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN game_tags gt ON g.id = gt.game_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON gt.tag_id = t.id WHERE g.id = #{id} AND g.is_deleted = 0

SELECT g.id, g.title, g.slug, g.summary, g.cover_image, g.category_id, gc.category_name, g.author_id, u.nickname AS author_name, g.platform, g.rating, g.developer, g.publisher, g.release_date, g.view_count, g.like_count, g.favorite_count, g.published_at, g.created_at, t.id AS tag_id, t.tag_name AS tag_name, t.tag_code AS tag_code, t.color AS tag_color FROM games g LEFT JOIN game_categories gc ON g.category_id = gc.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN game_tags gt ON g.id = gt.game_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON gt.tag_id = t.id WHERE g.status = 1 AND g.is_deleted = 0 AND g.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY g.published_at DESC

SELECT g.id, g.title, g.slug, g.summary, g.cover_image, g.category_id, gc.category_name, g.author_id, u.nickname AS author_name, g.platform, g.rating, g.developer, g.publisher, g.release_date, g.view_count, g.like_count, g.favorite_count, g.published_at, g.created_at, t.id AS tag_id, t.tag_name AS tag_name, t.tag_code AS tag_code, t.color AS tag_color FROM games g LEFT JOIN game_categories gc ON g.category_id = gc.id LEFT JOIN users u ON g.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN game_tags gt ON g.id = gt.game_id LEFT JOIN tags t ON gt.tag_id = t.id WHERE g.status = 1 AND g.is_deleted = 0 AND (g.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR g.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY g.published_at DESC
